vocab.sentence: Museums preserve important artifacts for future students.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 博物館保存重要文物，讓未來的學生能學習。

vocab.sentence: This institution trains young artists to repair old paintings.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這個機構訓練年輕藝術家修復古畫。

vocab.sentence: The bronze artifact was found inside an ancient tomb.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這件青銅文物是在一座古墓裡被發現的。

vocab.sentence: The city plans to convert the old station into a museum.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 市政府計畫把舊車站改造成博物館。

vocab.sentence: The guide told us an extraordinary story about the temple.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 導遊告訴我們一個關於這座寺廟的非凡故事。

vocab.sentence: Approximately two thousand people visit the site every day.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 每天大約有兩千人參觀這個地點。

vocab.sentence: Better infrastructure can make travel to the island easier.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 更好的基礎建設能讓前往這座島的旅程更方便。

vocab.sentence: The wall will deteriorate quickly if no one repairs it.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 如果沒有人修理，這面牆會很快惡化。

vocab.sentence: The old castle has become a popular destination for families.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這座古堡已成為家庭旅遊的熱門目的地。

vocab.sentence: The museum uses specialized tools to clean fragile objects.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 博物館使用專門工具清潔脆弱物件。

vocab.sentence: The researcher studied the ancient map intensely for hours.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 研究員專注地研究那張古地圖好幾個小時。

vocab.sentence: There are several notable temples in this historic district.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這個歷史街區有幾座著名寺廟。

vocab.sentence: Many people donate money to help preserve local heritage.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 許多人捐錢幫助保存地方文化遺產。

vocab.sentence: The bronze statue stands near the entrance of the museum.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那座青銅雕像立在博物館入口附近。

vocab.sentence: The gallery shows both ancient artifacts and contemporary art.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這間畫廊展示古文物與當代藝術。

vocab.sentence: The new hall gives visitors ample space to walk around.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 新大廳給參觀者充足的走動空間。

vocab.sentence: The broken vase is evidence of life in the ancient village.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這個破碎花瓶是古村落生活的證據。

vocab.sentence: The king was buried in a tomb under the hill.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那位國王被埋葬在山丘下的墳墓裡。

vocab.sentence: Young people should learn to cherish their cultural heritage.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 年輕人應該學會珍惜自己的文化遺產。

vocab.sentence: The building is not merely old; it is part of our history.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這棟建築不僅僅是老舊，它也是我們歷史的一部分。

vocab.sentence: Grandma taught us to cherish every family photo.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 奶奶教我們珍惜每一張家庭照片。

vocab.sentence: Visitors can see physical evidence of the city's past.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 參觀者可以看見這座城市過去的實體證據。

vocab.sentence: A professional repaired the damaged bronze bowl.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 一位專業人士修復了受損的青銅碗。

vocab.sentence: There is a restriction on touching the artifacts.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 館內有禁止觸摸文物的限制。

vocab.sentence: The guide gave us verbal instructions before we entered the tomb.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 導遊在我們進入古墓前給了口頭指示。

vocab.sentence: Taking photos may violate the rules in this museum.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 拍照可能違反這間博物館的規定。

vocab.sentence: The online content explains why the old wall must be protected.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 線上內容說明為什麼這面古牆必須被保護。

vocab.sentence: If people neglect the temple, it will soon deteriorate.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 如果人們忽視這座寺廟，它很快就會惡化。

vocab.sentence: A guided tour can be beneficial to first-time visitors.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 導覽對第一次來的參觀者很有益。

phrases.sentence: This museum holds the crown for attracting the most students in the city.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 這間博物館在吸引最多本市學生方面居首位。

phrases.sentence: The extraordinary bronze mask drew in a large crowd.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那個非凡的青銅面具吸引了一大群人。

phrases.sentence: Too many visitors can put a strain on local infrastructure.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 太多遊客可能對地方基礎建設造成壓力。

phrases.chinese: 脫穎而出；格外引人注目
phrases.sentence: The contemporary design helps the new museum stand out.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 當代設計讓這座新博物館格外引人注目。

phrases.sentence: The old town claimed the title of the most popular heritage destination.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 這座老城獲得最受歡迎文化遺產目的地的頭銜。

phrases.sentence: Parents pass local stories on to their children.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 父母把地方故事傳給孩子。

phrases.sentence: Wind and rain slowly wear down the stone steps.
The team put off the repair work because of heavy rain.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 團隊因大雨延後修復工作。

phrases.sentence: The website helps visitors filter out tours that are too expensive.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 這個網站幫助參觀者篩掉太貴的行程。

tips.label: Language Spotlight
tips.text: 用 hold the crown for、claim the title of 表示「在某方面居首位／獲得頭銜」。

tips.label: 吸引與篩選
tips.text: draw in 表示「吸引」，filter out 表示「過濾；篩選」。

tips.label: 壓力、磨損與延後
tips.text: put/place a strain on、wear down、put off 常用來描述文化遺產維護遇到的問題。

notes.title: Language Spotlight: ranking and titles
notes.rule: hold the crown for + N/V-ing; claim the title of + N
notes.description: 這兩個片語都跟「第一名、頭銜、最有代表性」有關。for 後面可接名詞或 V-ing；of 後面接名詞片語。
examples: This museum holds the crown for preserving bronze artifacts.
The city claimed the title of the best heritage destination.

notes.title: Language Spotlight: attraction and selection
notes.rule: draw in + N; filter out + N
notes.description: draw in 強調吸引人、注意力或興趣；filter out 強調把不需要或不合適的東西篩掉。
examples: The exhibition drew in many students.
The website filters out tours that violate safety rules.

notes.title: Language Spotlight: pressure and delay
notes.rule: put/place a strain on + N; put off + N/V-ing; wear down + N
notes.description: 這組片語常用來說明保存文物或文化遺產時的困難，例如壓力、磨損與延期。
examples: Tourism can put a strain on local infrastructure.
Rain slowly wears down the stone steps.
The team put off repairing the tomb.

notes.title: Language Spotlight: transfer and visibility
notes.rule: pass sth on to sb; stand out
notes.description: pass sth on to sb 表示把知識、故事或物品傳給某人；stand out 表示特別明顯或突出。
examples: Parents pass cultural heritage on to their children.
The bronze mask stands out in the exhibit.

quiz.question: The museum works hard to _______ old photographs and letters.
A university is an important educational _______.
The ancient bowl is a valuable _______ from the old kingdom.
Workers will _______ the empty factory into a cultural center.
quiz.hint: convert A into B 表示「把 A 轉變成 B」。

quiz.question: The dancer gave an _______ performance that everyone remembered.
quiz.hint: extraordinary 表示「非凡的；傑出的」。

quiz.question: The trip takes _______ three hours by bus.
Good roads and bridges are part of a city's _______.
Without care, the wooden house began to _______.
Kyoto is a famous travel _______ in Japan.
The repair team needs _______ knowledge to handle old paintings.
She listened _______ to every word of the lecture.
The city is known for its _______ night market and temples.
quiz.hint: notable 表示「著名的；顯著的」。

quiz.question: Local businesses will _______ money to restore the old theater.
The museum displays a _______ sword from ancient times.
The artist mixes traditional ideas with _______ design.
quiz.hint: contemporary 表示「當代的；現代的」。

quiz.question: There is _______ time for us to visit every room.
Scientists found strong _______ that people lived there long ago.
The queen's _______ was discovered under the desert sand.
The festival is part of our cultural _______.
The statue is not _______ a decoration; it tells a story.
We should _______ the memories of our grandparents.
The museum keeps both digital records and _______ objects.
You should ask a _______ before cleaning old coins.
quiz.hint: professional 可當名詞「專業人士」。

quiz.question: There is a strict _______ on food and drinks in the gallery.
A _______ warning is not enough; please write it down.
Do not _______ the rules by touching the paintings.
The video _______ explains the history of the ancient road.
Years of _______ caused the old house to fall apart.
Daily practice is _______ to language learning.
The museum _______ the crown for having the oldest bronze bell.
quiz.hint: hold the crown for 表示「在……方面居首位」。

quiz.question: Bright posters helped _______ more students to the exhibition.
Heavy tourism can put a _______ on small communities.
quiz.hint: put a strain on 表示「對……造成壓力」。

quiz.question: Among all the artifacts, the bronze mask really _______.
quiz.hint: stand out 表示「格外引人注目」。

quiz.question: The city hopes to claim the _______ of Asia's top heritage site.
quiz.hint: claim the title of 表示「獲得……頭銜」。

quiz.question: Teachers can pass useful study habits _______ to their students.
quiz.hint: pass sth on to sb 表示「把某物傳給某人」。

quiz.question: Tourists' footsteps slowly _______ the old wooden floor.
The concert was _______ until next Friday because of the storm.
Use this tool to _______ unsafe online content.
quiz.hint: filter out 表示「過濾；篩選」。

quiz.question: The ancient wall has _______ since people stopped repairing it.
quiz.hint: 現在完成式可表示從過去到現在的變化。

quiz.question: The institution has _______ old maps for over fifty years.
quiz.hint: has preserved 是現在完成式。

quiz.question: This is the most _______ artifact in the entire museum.
quiz.hint: most + 形容詞可形成最高級。

quiz.question: That gallery is _______ larger than the room we visited yesterday.
quiz.hint: 比較級前可用 much 加強語氣。

quiz.question: The more people donate, the _______ we can preserve the site.
quiz.hint: the more..., the better... 表示「越……越好」。

quiz.question: Visitors are asked _______ touching the bronze statues.
quiz.hint: ask sb to V 的被動形式是 be asked to V。

quiz.question: The tomb, _______ was discovered in 1920, is now protected.
quiz.hint: which 可引導非限定關係子句補充物。

quiz.question: The guide explained why the artifact _______ be moved.
_______ the restriction may damage the heritage site.
We put off _______ the old bridge until a professional arrived.
The content was designed _______ first-time visitors understand the exhibit.
The destination is famous _______ its contemporary art museum.
quiz.hint: be famous for 表示「以……聞名」。

vocab.sentence_chinese: 如果人們忽視這座寺廟，它很快就會惡化。

vocab.sentence_chinese: 導覽對第一次來的參觀者很有益。

phrases.sentence: This museum holds the crown for attracting the most students in the city.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 這間博物館在吸引最多本市學生方面居首位。

phrases.sentence: The extraordinary bronze mask drew in a large crowd.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那個非凡的青銅面具吸引了一大群人。

phrases.sentence: Too many visitors can put a strain on local infrastructure.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 太多遊客可能對地方基礎建設造成壓力。

phrases.sentence: The contemporary design helps the new museum stand out.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 當代設計讓這座新博物館格外引人注目。

phrases.sentence: The old town claimed the title of the most popular heritage destination.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 這座老城獲得最受歡迎文化遺產目的地的頭銜。

phrases.sentence: Parents pass local stories on to their children.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 父母把地方故事傳給孩子。

phrases.sentence: Wind and rain slowly wear down the stone steps.
The team put off the repair work because of heavy rain.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 團隊因大雨延後修復工作。

phrases.sentence: The website helps visitors filter out tours that are too expensive.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 這個網站幫助參觀者篩掉太貴的行程。

grammar.sentence: This museum holds the crown for preserving ancient artifacts.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這間博物館在保存古文物方面居首位。

grammar.sentence: The bronze statue drew in thousands of visitors last month.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那座青銅雕像上個月吸引了數千名遊客。

grammar.sentence: Too many tourists can put a strain on local infrastructure.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 太多遊客可能對地方基礎建設造成壓力。

grammar.sentence: The contemporary building stands out among the old houses.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那棟現代建築在老房子之中特別引人注目。

grammar.sentence: The city claimed the title of the best heritage destination.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這座城市獲得最佳文化遺產目的地的頭銜。

grammar.sentence: Grandparents pass family stories on to their grandchildren.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 祖父母把家族故事傳給孫子女。

grammar.sentence: Heavy rain can wear down the stone walls over time.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 大雨久而久之會磨損石牆。

grammar.sentence: The school put off the field trip because of bad weather.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 學校因天氣不好延後校外教學。

grammar.sentence: The app can filter out content that violates the rules.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這個 app 可以過濾掉違反規則的內容。

grammar.sentence: The old temple has deteriorated because of years of neglect.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這座古廟因多年忽視而惡化。

grammar.sentence: A professional has converted the station into a small museum.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 一位專業人士已把車站改造成小型博物館。

grammar.sentence: The institution has donated ample money to preserve the tomb.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這個機構已捐贈充足資金保存古墓。

grammar.sentence: Visitors must follow the restrictions to protect the artifacts.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 參觀者必須遵守限制以保護文物。

grammar.sentence: Physical evidence shows that people lived here long ago.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 實體證據顯示很久以前有人住在這裡。

grammar.sentence: The guide spoke intensely about the value of cultural heritage.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 導遊專注地談論文化遺產的價值。

grammar.sentence: This is the most extraordinary artifact in the collection.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這是館藏中最非凡的文物。

grammar.sentence: The website provides beneficial content for first-time visitors.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這個網站提供對初次參觀者有益的內容。

grammar.sentence: The restriction was created to prevent people from touching the paintings.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這項限制是為了防止人們觸摸畫作。

grammar.sentence: We should cherish old buildings instead of merely replacing them.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我們應該珍惜老建築，而不是僅僅取代它們。

grammar.sentence: Approximately fifty volunteers helped repair the old wall.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 大約五十位志工幫忙修復古牆。

grammar.sentence: The museum uses specialized tools when it cleans bronze objects.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 博物館清潔青銅物件時使用專門工具。

grammar.sentence: The online tour draws in students who cannot visit in person.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 線上導覽吸引無法親自參觀的學生。

grammar.sentence: Repair costs put a strain on the small institution.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 修復費用對這個小機構造成壓力。

grammar.sentence: The old map stands out because of its unusual colors.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這張古地圖因不尋常的顏色而特別顯眼。

grammar.sentence: The town hopes to claim the title of a top cultural destination.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這座城鎮希望獲得頂尖文化目的地的頭銜。

grammar.sentence: Parents pass respect for heritage on to the next generation.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 父母把對文化遺產的尊重傳給下一代。

grammar.sentence: Sunlight may wear down the colors of old paintings.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 陽光可能會削弱古畫的色彩。

grammar.sentence: They put off opening the tomb until experts arrived.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他們延後開啟古墓，直到專家抵達。

grammar.sentence: The search engine filters out pages with harmful content.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 搜尋引擎會過濾掉含有有害內容的頁面。

grammar.sentence: Neglecting heritage sites can violate our duty to the past.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 忽視文化遺產地可能違反我們對過去的責任。
